chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.404 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority case 1. For hearing of case 2. For hearing of MA No.6676/2025 08.09.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Qaim Ali Memon Advocate a/w respondent No.4. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- None were present on behalf of the applicant on 25.08.2025 whereafter notice was issued and the matter came up before the Court when the applicant was present in person and the matter was adjourned by consent to 08.09.2025. Today none is present for the applicant. No intimation is received. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
